parsed_review.summary: CP00-416 is a descriptor-only payments-core P09 permission slice (RP13.P09.M05.S02-S11, risk A, 10 units) and passes independent read-only review. Pack identity, deliverable distribution {claude_review:1,security_audit:2,test:1,ui:1,implementation:5}, and micro-title "Permission And Audit Binding"x10 are consistent across the live plan (closeout-pack-plan.json:411-532), manifest, baseline, registry pack binding (registry.js:409-424), and contract current_pack/historical binding. The descriptor and 10 rows (service.js:3038-3157) are reproduced exactly in the contract projection (payments-core-contract.json:26775-26904), with each row marked descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false, customer_safe_errors_only:true, raw_payload_included:false. All 7 required public exports exist (service.js + validators.js:4357-4502) and are surfaced via index.js export *. Boundaries hold: source is pure frozen-object construction with intra-package imports only (no fs/child_process/fetch/db/eval); no-write attestation (registry.js:2212; contract:4880-4969) and freezeCp416Result assert no payments/matching/AR/journal runtime, no audit write, no real data, and no Hermes runtime receipt. Hermes H13 is used only as deterministic packet/receipt labels and gate IDs, not product runtime. Authority is correct: claude_is_final_approval:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true; pack-level production_ready is false (implemented_pending_review) with no runtime over-claim. Tests (model.test.js:1648-1696) and the contract validator (validate-rp13-payments-core-contract.mjs:556-1374) assert coverage/slice validity, descriptor-only rows, authority boundary, and handoff to CP00-417/S12; command-evidence records all implementation/test/contract/plan/repo-wide gates at exit 0. CP178+ hardening checks pass: auth preflight succeeded (exit 0, 1436-byte valid-JSON stdout, no 0-byte/malformed/fenced/tool-shaped evidence), and post-review artifacts are correctly absent and not yet claimed. No P0/P1/P2/P3 defects. One non-blocking observation: changed-file-scope.json dual-lists new-session-handoff.md and the cp00-416 evidence dir under both untracked_implementation_files and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved, but active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is empty so nothing required was omitted (by-design list overlap). Claude remains a read-only reviewer and not final approval authority.
